project.description: Build a HarmonyOS project zip with mounted command-line tools.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: ZIP_PATH
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Absolute path inside the Jenkins container, for example /data/uploads/MultiFinancialManagement-master.zip

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: JOB_ID
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Optional output directory name under /data/jobs. Defaults to jenkins-${BUILD_NUMBER}.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: BUILD_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Build timeout passed to the HarmonyOS build script.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -u
: "${ZIP_PATH:?ZIP_PATH is required}"
TOOLS_DIR="${TOOLS_DIR:-/opt/harmony/command-line-tools}" JOBS_DIR="${JOBS_DIR:-/data/jobs}" export BUILD_TIMEOUT_SECONDS="${BUILD_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-1200}"
if [ ! -f "$ZIP_PATH" ]; then echo "ERROR: ZIP_PATH not found: $ZIP_PATH" exit 2 fi
job_name="${JOB_ID:-jenkins-${BUILD_NUMBER}}" job_name="$(printf '%s' "$job_name" | tr -c 'A-Za-z0-9_.-' '_')" JOB_DIR="$JOBS_DIR/$job_name"
echo "zip_path: $ZIP_PATH" echo "job_dir: $JOB_DIR" echo "tools_dir: $TOOLS_DIR" echo "timeout_seconds: $BUILD_TIMEOUT_SECONDS"
build_rc=0 /opt/harmony-build/scripts/build_harmony_zip.sh "$ZIP_PATH" "$JOB_DIR" "$TOOLS_DIR" || build_rc=$?
rm -rf artifacts logs status.json mkdir -p artifacts logs
if [ -d "$JOB_DIR/artifacts" ]; then find "$JOB_DIR/artifacts" -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec cp -f {} artifacts/ \; fi if [ -f "$JOB_DIR/logs/build.log" ]; then cp -f "$JOB_DIR/logs/build.log" logs/build.log fi if [ -f "$JOB_DIR/status.json" ]; then cp -f "$JOB_DIR/status.json" status.json fi
echo "workspace_artifacts: $WORKSPACE/artifacts" echo "persistent_job_dir: $JOB_DIR" exit "$build_rc"
